name: Intel faceted filtering spec
what_it_solves: Spec for faceted filtering over the CRM/intel corpus — how to slice leads by tumor type / axis / stage.
how_it_solves: INTEL_FACETED_FILTERING.md defines each facet with its controlled vocabulary and mapping back to schema A/B.
why_it_exists: Prevents ad-hoc lead segmentation queries by making the facet catalogue explicit.
